ApiError.description: A generic error schema used across the API for error handling.

debugId.description: Unique identifier for the instance of this error

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for the instance of this error

eventType.description: The type of event to subscribe. [Events Standard](https://developer.greenlake.hpe.com/docs/greenlake/services/event/public/events/)

SystemSubscriptionInput.description: Schema for creating a new subscription.

eventType.description: The type of event to subscribe. [Events Standard](https://developer.greenlake.hpe.com/docs/greenlake/services/event/public/events/)

SystemSubscriptionListResponse.description: A list response format for subscriptions.

count.description: The number of subscription objects returned in the `items` array for the current request.

items.description: An array of subscription objects, each representing a unique subscription.

offset.description: The zero-based index in the complete list of retrieved subscriptions that marks the beginning of the response.

total.description: The total number of subscriptions available in the system that match the provided query or filters.

SystemSubscriptionResponse.description: Outlines the details of a subscription response.

createdAt.description: The date and time the subscription is created.

createdBy.description: The user that created the subscription.

generation.description: Monotonically increasing update counter to track the subscription version.

updatedAt.description: The last date and time the subscription is updated.

updatedBy.description: The user that updated the subscription.

SystemWebhookInput.description: Represents the data required to register a new webhook.

destination.description: The URL where events will be sent.

SystemWebhookResourceInputRef.description: A reference to a specific webhook resource, providing a link (URI) directly to the referenced webhook.

SystemWebhookResponse.description: The response schema for webhook operations.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook was created.

createdBy.description: The user that created the webhook.

destination.description: The URL where events will be sent.

id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

resourceUri.description: URI to the resource itself (i.e. a self link).

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the webhook was last updated

updatedBy.description: The user that updated the webhook.

SystemWebhookUpdate.description: Contains fields that can be updated for an existing webhook

destination.description: The URL where events will be sent.

Bearer.description: Personal access token compliant with RFC8725 issued by the HPE GreenLake platform.

info.description: API for registering and managing HTTP webhooks and subscriptions.
info.title: System Webhook API - v1beta1

delete.description: Delete the list of subscriptions by the IDs, stopping further event notification linked to the subscriptions

parameters.description: The ID of the subscription to delete.

equals.description: Delete all subscriptions based on the IDs

parameters.name: id

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid JWT token in Request

404.description: Bad Request, A subscription doesn't exist with the given ID.

value.message: Unexpected error occurred while creating subscription, if the issue persists, Please contact HPE Support

get.description:
Retrieves a list of subscriptions associated to webhooks, organized in descending order based on their creation time.

**Pagination**: This endpoint exclusively supports offset-based pagination.

**Filtering**: Following are the supported filter parameters : `webhookId`

parameters.description: Specifies the number of results to be returned. The default value is 10.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Specifies the zero-based resource offset to start the response from. The default value is 0.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Filter subscriptions events using an [OData V4](https://www.odata.org/documentation/) formatted filter string.

FilterWithWebhookId.description: Returns subscriptions for a user within a particular webhook.

parameters.name: filter

schema.description:
Filter data using a subset of OData 4.0 and return only the subset of resources that match the filter.
Get list of subscriptions that can be filtered by:
- webhookId
schema.title: Filter

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid JWT token in Request

get.description:
Retrieves a list of webhooks, organized in descending order based on their creation time.

**Pagination**: This endpoint exclusively supports offset-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Specifies the zero-based resource offset to start the response from. The default value is 0.
